contents.value:
**From binding** (\`sophgo,cv1800b-pinctrl\`):\n\npull up the pin. Takes as optional argument on hardware
supporting it the pull strength in Ohm.

---

**Source:** Linux kernel Documentation\n\n```\n- bias-pull-up:
    Enable internal pull up resistor

- bias-pull-down:
    Enable internal pull down resistor

- drive-strength:
    Valid drive strength values include 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16 (mA)\n```
